apps.name: Announcements Board
apps.tagline: A rotating notice board for your masjid's screens
apps.author: OpenMasjidAPPS
apps.description:
A clean, full-screen notice board for the TVs and monitors in your masjid. It gently
rotates through your announcements — Jummah timings, classes, fundraisers, reminders —
alongside a live clock and the date.

Type your announcements into the slots below (you can leave the unused ones blank).
Each one becomes a slide. You can set how many seconds each slide stays on screen and add
an optional note that stays along the bottom (great for a website or a short reminder).

**After installing:** open the app and set the screen to full-screen (most TVs and browsers
do this with the F11 key). To change your announcements later, update this app's settings in
OpenMasjidOS and restart it.

settings.label: Seconds each announcement stays on screen
Time zone (e.g. America/New_York — leave blank to use this screen's zone)

apps.name: Prayer Times Display
apps.tagline: A calm, full-screen prayer clock for your masjid's screens
apps.author: OpenMasjidAPPS
apps.description:
A beautiful, full-screen prayer-times display made for the TVs and monitors in
your masjid. It shows a large live clock, today's Hijri and Gregorian dates, the
five daily prayers plus sunrise, and a countdown to the next prayer — with the
current prayer gently highlighted.

Prayer times are calculated on the device itself from the location and method you
choose below, so the display keeps working even without an internet connection.
It supports the common calculation methods and both the Standard and Hanafi
opinions for Asr.

**After installing:** open the app and put the screen into full-screen (most TVs
and browsers do this with the F11 key or a kiosk setting). To change any value
later, update the app's settings in OpenMasjidOS and restart it.

Tip: you can find your masjid's latitude and longitude by searching its name on
any maps website and copying the two numbers (for example `40.7128` and
`-74.0060`).

settings.label: Time zone (e.g. America/New_York — leave blank to use this screen's zone)
